items.title: Datasette adds SQL write support
items.oneliner: Datasette 1.0a34 adds CRUD writes, so you can edit SQLite-backed data directly instead of treating it as read-only.

items.title: Secure Datasette over Tailscale
items.oneliner: Alpha plugin exposes Datasette through Tailscale, giving private dataset access without hand-rolling VPN or reverse proxy setup.

items.title: Datasette Agent gets plugin hooks
items.oneliner: Datasette Agent 0.3a0 adds extensible plugins for interactive querying workflows you can adapt to your own data tools.

items.title: Use gzip like a language model
items.oneliner: Hands-on experiment shows how primed gzip can generate text continuations, making compression theory immediately testable in code.

items.title: FIFA auth bypass writeup
items.oneliner: Detailed exploit walkthrough shows how client-side role checks exposed World Cup streaming controls, with lessons for API authorization reviews.

items.title: Firefox moves to zlib-rs
items.oneliner: Deep migration post explains swapping zlib for Rust code in Firefox, including test drift and CPU-specific crash debugging.

items.title: Build Rust projects Zig-style
items.oneliner: Practical walkthrough uses Zig's build system to compile a Rust project, clarifying what Cargo normally hides.

items.title: OpenBSD PPP bug autopsy
items.oneliner: Security teardown traces a 27-year authentication bypass to one length-check bug, with code-level lessons for protocol parsers.

items.title: Make HTTP requests with Bash
items.oneliner: Tiny Bash trick uses /dev/tcp to send raw HTTP requests when curl or wget are missing in stripped containers.

items.title: Embed a tiny ANSI C UI
items.oneliner: Portable immediate-mode UI library in ANSI C gives you lightweight widgets for tools, games, and embedded apps.
